summary: Comprehensive grep-based code audit found zero developer TODO/FIXME/HACK comments in production code. All critical paths (brain_pipeline, autofix_engine, micro_pentest, mcp_server, app.py) are clean. Three matches found are enum values and intentional feature references, not technical debt.
methodology: Exhaustive grep search across suite-core/, suite-api/, suite-attack/, suite-feeds/, suite-evidence-risk/, suite-integrations/, and tests/ directories for patterns: TODO, FIXME, HACK, XXX, WORKAROUND
